item.title: Remove file from Git history
item.author: Author
item.description: 1 2 bfg --delete-files YOUR-FILE-WITH-SENSITIVE-DATA git push --force Reference Removing files from a repository’s history - GitHub Docs Removing sensitive data from a repository - GitHub Docs

item.title: Git
item.author: Author
item.description: 20210315151258|Delete history 20210315152941|Giảm size git repo 20210609182144|Remove folder and its contents from git/GitHub’s history 20210609182144|Remove file from Git history [[git-submodules">Git submodules Xóa file, folder khỏi git tracking (vẫn keep ở working dir) cd to git folder git rm -r --cached path_to_your_folder/ add to .gitignore https://stackoverflow.com/questions/24290358/remove-a-folder-from-git-tracking Setting git config core.eol lf git config core.autocrlf input git config –global core.autocrlf false git config –global core.eol lf
